name: Hamburger & Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 ½ cups Tomatoes, canned plum, undrain
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef in a large saucepan. Drain off any fat.
2. Add celery, carrots, cabbage, onion, beef broth, tomatoes and juice, barley, thyme, basil, and garlic.
3. Cover and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 45 minutes to an hour or until vegetables and barley are just tender.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper.
6. Check seasoning and serve with plenty of crusty bread or rolls.
